approval_reason_or_blocker: Approved: the tool now provides a structured prompt workflow with role/task, context builder, constraints/safety, output-format, and optional human-review checklist sections. Controls meaningfully change prompt goal, detail level, output shape, review sensitivity, and review checklist inclusion. Content is specific, non-affiliation is clear, and accuracy/compliance/safety/output-quality guarantees are explicitly disclaimed.

Blocker: although the tool is substantially upgraded and safety-framed, it remains an X/Twitter post-generation tool with platform-dependent social publishing intent. Extra caution says not to approve if it still feels platform-dependent; it should stay noindex pending a stricter social/platform risk decision.
